meta_title: For Freelancers: user onboarding to Solve can't debug code (Advanced Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome can't debug code. A Advanced-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: How Freelancers Solve Debugging with Advanced User Onboarding
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with cryptic bugs. Learn how to implement intelligent user onboarding using Antigravity and Claude Code to streamline your development process.
content.answer_block: When debugging stalls, your user onboarding is likely the culprit—either by masking state errors or failing to capture critical logs. By integrating Antigravity for automated state analysis and Claude Code for iterative repairs, you transform onboarding from a simple UI flow into a powerful, real-time diagnostic engine for your SaaS.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a terminal that refuses to speak. The client is asking for a status update, but your local environment is a graveyard of silent failures and cryptic stack traces. You aren't just losing time; you're losing the professional edge that keeps your freelance business profitable.

But what if the solution isn't just staring at the debugger? What if your user onboarding flow was actually a diagnostic tool in disguise? By shifting your architecture to treat onboarding as a high-fidelity data collection point, you can automate error surface reduction and ship production-ready code in half the time.

steps.title: Map the Failure Surface
steps.description: Identify where the onboarding flow breaks by instrumenting your state machine to log transitions before executing any logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my onboarding state machine. Map all possible exit points and identify where async validation logic is failing to catch null pointers.

steps.title: Inject Diagnostic Hooks
steps.description: Insert non-intrusive logging hooks into the onboarding steps to capture the exact payload causing the crash.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a decorator pattern for my onboarding steps that logs the state object on failure and flushes to a debug console.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "Add diagnostic logging to onboarding steps" --file ./src/onboarding/steps.ts

steps.title: Automate Edge Case Simulation
steps.description: Use synthetic data to push your onboarding flow into failure states, forcing the code to reveal its hidden logic gaps.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a suite of synthetic onboarding payloads that trigger every possible validation error in my current implementation.

steps.title: Iterative Repair with Claude Code
steps.description: Feed the captured logs back into the model to generate surgical fixes rather than refactoring the entire module.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the identified failure point in the onboarding controller based on the error logs provided in the trace.

steps.title: Validate and Deploy
steps.description: Verify the fix with automated regression testing to ensure the onboarding experience remains seamless for the end user.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the applied fix for performance impact and verify it adheres to my existing codebase architectural patterns.

pro_tips: Always wrap your onboarding state transitions in a try-catch block that triggers an automated snapshot of the global state.
Use Claude Code to generate unit tests based on production logs; it's the fastest way to achieve 90%+ coverage.
Implement a 'Debug Mode' flag in your onboarding environment variables that bypasses UI delays for faster testing cycles.
Treat your onboarding JSON schema as the source of truth for all API validation; update the schema first, then let AI update the code.
Never manually fix a recurring bug; use Antigravity to identify the pattern and Claude Code to write the permanent abstraction.
content.next_steps: Once your onboarding flow is debugged and stable, refactor your core application logic using these same diagnostic hooks to prevent future regression.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting your code and start shipping features that actually work. Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
